v1.title: Editorial
v1.desc: Magazine-style consulting landing. Serif display, cream + ink + ochre. Substance over flash.

v2.title: Terminal
v2.desc: Monospace amber-CRT landing that reads like a well-organized tmux session.

v3.title: Manifesto
v3.desc: Five theses, five full-viewport statements. Ultra-high contrast, electric red accent.

v4.title: Swiss Grid
v4.desc: Strict modernist grid, numbered sections, hairline rules. Restraint signals rigor.

v5.title: Pixel
v5.desc: 24x24 pixel motif borrowed from PXL Clock. Playful but credible, LED palette, CRT overlay.
